gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, as a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.
